headline: Dell (DELL) Says XPS Eyesafe Study Improved Sleep Eye Comfort And Productivity
summary: Dell Technologies' XPS laptops with Eyesafe IQ and Eyesafe Display features were evaluated in a 9 week independent in home study. The research, presented at a major scientific conference and published in a peer reviewed journal, reported improvements in user sleep quality, eye comfort, and productivity. The findings give Dell a new, research based wellness angle for its premium PC offerings, beyond traditional hardware metrics. Dell Technologies, NYSE:DELL, is drawing fresh attention to its...
